title: Roanoke Cobblemon
description: The perfect blend of Pokemon & Minecraft, join the world of Cobblemon: A brand new, 1.21.1 Pokemon Mod packed with features & performance upgrades
body:
A how to guide for installing Cobblemon

Pokemon & Minecraft have never been merged together as well as Cobblemon has managed it.

  Play on the latest version of Minecraft, with 100s of Pokemon blending in perfectly to their surroundings. With high quality animations, natural behaviour, and Minecraft style'd modelling, you won't notice this is a 3rd party mod. Cobblemon has grown from 500~ members to over 60,000 in the past few months, and is soon to be the biggest Pokemon Mod Minecraft has ever seen.  

Perfect battles, every time

  Cobblemon makes use of Showdown's Battle Engine vs creating their own - meaning battles, stats, and moves are all standardised with the normal competitive scene. This also means no waiting glitches 40 minutes into the last round of a tournament, it means perfect battles, every time.   

The perfect platform

  Cobblemon works with Fabric, a Minecraft Mod Loader that has surpassed Forge as the go to in recent years thanks to it's amazing performance upgrades & modded ecosystem. Our modpack makes use of these other brilliant add-ons, such as Sodium, JEI, Zoomify, and more, all of which massively improve your QOL when playing.  

The perfect server

We run a NOP2W Cobblemon Network, Roanoke, our aim is to offer the premium experience you expect from P2W servers, without the exploitative stores. We have a thriving competitive scene with weekly tournaments, and events such as build competitions & classic minigames like Spleef. We've been blessed with a talented group of staff, including amazing builders, artists, and developers - all focused on making the Cobblemon experience the best it can be for players.  

Mods Credits

+ Xaerox's Minimap - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap + Xaerox's World Map - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map

Datapacks Credits

+ LostMons - https://modrinth.com/datapack/lostmons-cobblemon + Magikarp Jump - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/magikarp-jump-pack-(cobblemon)
